message:
fix: resolve CI lint errors and data races in acp tests

Fix 8 errcheck violations (unchecked Close/Wait returns) and 1 unparam
(parseIntColumn fallback always 0). Fix data races in tests where
activePromptID and receivedMsgs were accessed without synchronization.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
